case_title: WEN, WEI JIAN et al vs. MATHEWS, ROSALIND LEIGHTON AKA ROSALIND LEIGHTON et al

docket_entries.description: JUN 15, 1994 DEPT. #4 9:35AM C/C FOR TRIAL ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS. 9:36AM PLAINTIFF WITNESS S & E. EXHINIT #1 30 DAYS NOYICE. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT: ROSALIND L. MATTHEWS AND WARREN MATTHEWS. RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF:1938 DONNER AVE. RENTS AND DAMAGES: $2,436.18. LEASE FORFEITED. COSTS PER COST BILL. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHEWS, ROSALIND LEIGHTON AKA ROSALIND LEIGHTON MATHEWS, WARREN AKA WARREN LEIGHTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1938 DONNER AVE. $2,436.18 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,436.18, LEASE FORFEITED
